refinements.kbve.agents.SetTokenRequest.server_id: .regex(/^\d{17,20}$/, 'Must be a valid Discord snowflake (17-20 digits)')
refinements.kbve.agents.SetTokenRequest.service: .regex(/^[a-z0-9_]{2,32}$/, 'Service must be 2-32 chars: lowercase a-z, 0-9, underscore')
refinements.kbve.agents.SetTokenRequest.token_name: .regex(/^[a-z0-9_-]{3,64}$/, 'Token name must be 3-64 lowercase chars: a-z, 0-9, underscore, dash')
refinements.kbve.agents.SetTokenRequest.token_value: .min(10, 'Token value must be 10-8000 characters').max(8000, 'Token value must be 10-8000 characters')
refinements.kbve.agents.DeleteTokenRequest.server_id: .regex(/^\d{17,20}$/, 'Must be a valid Discord snowflake (17-20 digits)')
refinements.kbve.agents.ToggleTokenRequest.server_id: .regex(/^\d{17,20}$/, 'Must be a valid Discord snowflake (17-20 digits)')
refinements.kbve.agents.PeekTokenRequest.server_id: .regex(/^\d{17,20}$/, 'Must be a valid Discord snowflake (17-20 digits)')
refinements.kbve.agents.PeekTokenRequest.service: .regex(/^[a-z0-9_]{2,32}$/, 'Service must be 2-32 chars: lowercase a-z, 0-9, underscore')
refinements.kbve.agents.ListTokensRequest.server_id: .regex(/^\d{17,20}$/, 'Must be a valid Discord snowflake (17-20 digits)')
